codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies the feature contract. Repository stored-row decoding keeps arbitrary-table string-form RecordId compatibility inside the field-type-aware decode seam (decode_stored_row_value -> normalize_foreign_shapes -> decode_stored_record_links), while the global decode_record_link_value helper is explicitly documented as RecordId-only and no longer the generic rewrite path. Focused regression coverage also proves ordinary colon strings remain unchanged through save/get/get_record.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill still lacks a clear verification-only path for already-landed baseline features, which forced this feature's worker to mark a procedure deviation even though no scoped code edits were necessary.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff C:\Users\admin\.factory\missions\fb36f232-36a4-4e47-b2c9-192ab540f0fc\handoffs\2026-03-23T20-33-42-205Z__milestone-c-typed-stored-row-record-id-decode-seam-implementation__75696bfe-9aa5-4ca6-aab7-8db039a1fab3.json reports followedProcedure=false only because the seam was already present in the checked-out baseline.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff evidence, commit diff, current runtime code, mission/shared-state files, and focused tests.
